mapper.sql: t.id, t.order_lock_id, t.order_id, t.lock_scene, t.lock_holder_id, t.lock_holder_role, t.lock_start_time, t.lock_release_time, t.lock_release_method, t.lock_release_reason, t.unlock_user_id, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_lock t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_lock t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_lock ( order_lock_id, order_id, lock_scene, lock_holder_id, lock_holder_role, lock_start_time, lock_release_time, lock_release_method, lock_release_reason, unlock_user_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{orderLockId}, #{orderId}, #{lockScene}, #{lockHolderId}, #{lockHolderRole}, #{lockStartTime}, #{lockReleaseTime}, #{lockReleaseMethod}, #{lockReleaseReason}, #{unlockUserId}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_lock ( order_lock_id, order_id, lock_scene, lock_holder_id, lock_holder_role, lock_start_time, lock_release_time, lock_release_method, lock_release_reason, unlock_user_id, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.orderLockId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.lockScene}, #{item.lockHolderId}, #{item.lockHolderRole}, #{item.lockStartTime}, #{item.lockReleaseTime}, #{item.lockReleaseMethod}, #{item.lockReleaseReason}, #{item.unlockUserId}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_lock t SET
t.lock_release_time = #{lockReleaseTime},
t.lock_release_method = #{lockReleaseMethod},
t.lock_release_reason = #{lockReleaseReason},
t.unlock_user_id = #{unlockUserId},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_lock t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
